name: Infestation
text: During ground combat, after one of your opponent's units is destroyed: You may place up to 2 infantry on that planet. Then, return this card to the Arachnera player.

name: Plea Deal
text: Before you would perform an action on your turn: You may place this card face up in your play area. Until the end of this turn, treat this card as if it were a copy of a technology card that the PSM player controls. Return this card to the PSM player at the start of the status phase.
